relationships.renata-ephrem: Intellectual recognition during the paradox reveal
relationships.yara-ephrem: Mutual respect forged in the safety architecture dispute
relationships.mateo-yuki: Shared instinct. He showed her the 0.9743. She said: résidu.

events: T1: Yuki detects residuals.
T2: Yuki shows data to Priya.
T3: Mateo at Paranal. Bracelet. Seo-yun.
T4: Renata models match Earth. Ephrem finds singular topology. Yuki joins group.
T5: Press leaks. Yuki misidentified. The box. Not yet.
T6: Official confirmation. Renata carries result 2 weeks. Dinner with Mateus.
T7: Renata presents to working group. Ephrem names the paradox.
T8: Kwame verifies temporal echo. Signal precedes source by 11 microseconds.
T9: Yara recruited. Nadia calculates energy needs. The 0.9743 planted.
T10: Ephrem topology. Yuki calls mother. Bientôt.
T11: Yara-Ephrem dispute. The surface without boundary.
T12: Paradox public. Jeanne. Okonkwo. Darwish ratifies.
T13: Construction begins. Helena.
T14: Mateo transferred. Meets Yuki.
T15: Nadia power deviations. Kwame echo in calibration.
T16: Mateo deeper. Entry 48.
T17: Mateo finds the 0.9743. Shows Yuki.
T18: Three pieces. Yara's review. Nadia denied. Kwame's note. Nobody assembles.
T19: Eve. Yuki calls mother — rien de spécial. Mateo looks one last time.
T20: Activation. The fourteen seconds. Kwame's voice lost. Yuki recognizes the pattern.
T21: The silence. Mateo at his screen. Yuki in the desert. Then La Serena. The box. She opens it.
